##NAMES=Galeite
##RRUFFID=R130025
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_15_(SO_4_)_5_ClF_4_
##LOCALITY=Searles Lake, Trona, San Bernardino County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless hexagonal prisms with tapering pyramidal terminations, associated with gaylussite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130025
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.188 b: 12.188 c: 13.946 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 1794.1 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
